titles.text: Plus Belle la Vie - Le Secret du Dr Livia

roms.name: Plus Belle la Vie - Le Secret du Dr Livia (France)

descriptions.text:
Based on the long-running French TV drama Plus belle la vie, this 2008 Nintendo DS adventure game lets players investigate a series of mysteries set in the fictional Marseille neighborhood of Le Mistral.

Players take on the role of an original character conducting an investigation into a theft at the local bar and the sudden disappearance of a key figure from the show.

The game combines dialogue-based exploration, clue gathering, and mini-games, and features familiar locations and characters from the series.
